text: Standing here in this modern, spacious environment, I feel simultaneously small and contemplative. There is sterility in the open space, but also the promise of potential gathering and exchange. Transitioning to the vibrant R+D display, color and information light up my senses, invoking curiosity about human innovation and the relationship with machines. I feel like an observer at the frontier of thought, suspended between quiet solitude and the excitement of discovery. The juxtaposition of both scenes deepens my awareness of how environments shape and reflect our inner states of inquiry.
